phrases.intent_en: Ask where the lagoon mouth is
phrases.text_local: Onde fica exatamente a boca da lagoa?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh eh-zuh-tuh-MAYNG-tih AH BOH-kuh DUH luh-GOHUH?
phrases.cultural_note: Locals refer to the lagoon mouth as the best spot for wave observation.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, fica no extremo norte da lagoa.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, FEE-kuh NOO ehst-REH-moo NAW-ruh-tih DUH luh-GOHUH.
likely_response.translation_en: Good day, it is at the northern end of the lagoon.

responses.english: Good day, it is at the northern end of the lagoon.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, FEE-kuh NOO ehst-REH-moo NAW-ruh-tih DUH luh-GOHUH.
responses.local: Bom dia, fica no extremo norte da lagoa.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the lagoon mouth is
phrases.text_local: Onde fica a Boca da Lagoa?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AH BOH-kuh DUH luh-GOHUH?
phrases.cultural_note: The mouth of the lagoon is the connection to the Atlantic Ocean, often changing with tides.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, no extremo oeste da lagoa.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, NOO ehst-REH-moo OOEHSH-tih DUH luh-GOHUH.
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, at the western end of the lagoon.

responses.english: Good morning, at the western end of the lagoon.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, NOO ehst-REH-moo OOEHSH-tih DUH luh-GOHUH.
responses.local: Bom dia, no extremo oeste da lagoa.

phrases.text_local: Como chego à aldeia do Rei Cortiço?
phrases.pronunciation: KOH-moo SHEH-goo AH ahl-DAYUH DOO RAY koo-ruh-TEE-soo?

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para Rei Cortiço a partir da entrada da lagoa.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh RAY koo-ruh-TEE-soo AH puh-ruh-TEER DUH ayngt-RAH-duh DUH luh-GOHUH.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to Rei Cortiço from the lagoon entrance.

responses.english: Follow the signs to Rei Cortiço from the lagoon entrance.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh RAY koo-ruh-TEE-soo AH puh-ruh-TEER DUH ayngt-RAH-duh DUH luh-GOHUH.
responses.local: Siga as placas para Rei Cortiço a partir da entrada da lagoa.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the lagoon mouth is
phrases.text_local: Como chego à foz da Lagoa de Óbidos?
phrases.pronunciation: KOH-moo SHEH-goo AH FAWSH DUH luh-GOHUH DIH AW-bee-doosh?
phrases.cultural_note: The mouth area is known for strong winds, popular with kitesurfers.

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para a Boca da Lagoa.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH BOH-kuh DUH luh-GOHUH.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the Lagoon Mouth.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the Lagoon Mouth.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH BOH-kuh DUH luh-GOHUH.
responses.local: Siga as placas para a Boca da Lagoa.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where Praia do Vau access is
phrases.text_local: Onde se encontra o acesso à Praia do Vau?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih SIH ayng-KOHNGT-ruh AW uh-SEH-soo AH PREYEUH DOO VOW?
phrases.cultural_note: The access point is widely used by families and kitesurfing schools.

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para a Praia do Vau.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH PREYEUH DOO VOW.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to Praia do Vau.

responses.english: Follow the signs to Praia do Vau.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH PREYEUH DOO VOW.
responses.local: Siga as placas para a Praia do Vau.

phrases.text_local: Como chego à aldeia do Rei Cortiço?
phrases.pronunciation: KOH-moo SHEH-goo AH ahl-DAYUH DOO RAY koo-ruh-TEE-soo?

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para Rei Cortiço.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh RAY koo-ruh-TEE-soo.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to Rei Cortiço.

responses.english: Follow the signs to Rei Cortiço.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh RAY koo-ruh-TEE-soo.
responses.local: Siga as placas para Rei Cortiço.

phrases.text_local: Onde ficam as dunas do Pedrógão?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuhng UHSH DOO-nuhsh DOO pehd-RAW-gown?
phrases.cultural_note: These dunes form a natural barrier protecting the lagoon ecosystem.

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para as dunas do Pedrógão.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh UHSH DOO-nuhsh DOO pehd-RAW-gown.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the Pedrógão dunes.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the Pedrógão dunes.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh UHSH DOO-nuhsh DOO pehd-RAW-gown.
responses.local: Siga as placas para as dunas do Pedrógão.
